body.title: Tiramisu
body.description: Classic Italian no-bake dessert with layers of coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.
body.ingredients: ["6 egg yolks","3/4 cup sugar","500g mascarpone cheese","2 cups heavy cream","2 cups strong espresso, cooled","3 tbsp coffee liqueur","24 ladyfinger biscuits","Cocoa powder","Dark chocolate shavings"]
body.instructions:
1. Whisk egg yolks and sugar until thick and pale.
2. Add mascarpone and mix until smooth.
3. Whip heavy cream to stiff peaks, fold into mascarpone mixture.
4. Combine cooled espresso with coffee liqueur.
5. Quickly dip each ladyfinger in the coffee mixture.
6. Layer dipped ladyfingers in a 9x13 dish.
7. Spread half the mascarpone cream over the ladyfingers.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Dust generously with cocoa powder and top with chocolate shavings.
10. Refrigerate at least 4 hours, preferably overnight.

body.title: Teriyaki Salmon
body.description: Glazed salmon fillets with a sweet and savory homemade teriyaki sauce, served with steamed rice.
body.ingredients: ["4 salmon fillets","1/4 cup soy sauce","2 tbsp mirin","2 tbsp sake","1 tbsp sugar","1 tsp ginger, grated","2 cups jasmine rice","Sesame seeds","Green onions"]
body.instructions:
1. Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, and ginger for the teriyaki sauce.
2. Marinate salmon in half the sauce for 15 minutes.
3. Cook rice according to package directions.
4. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear salmon skin-side up for 3 minutes.
5. Flip and cook for 3 more minutes.
6. Pour remaining sauce over salmon and let it glaze for 1 minute.
7. Serve over rice, garnished with sesame seeds and sliced green onions.

body.title: Caesar Salad
body.description: Crisp romaine lettuce with homemade Caesar dressing, crunchy croutons, and shaved parmesan.
body.ingredients: ["1 head romaine lettuce","1/2 cup parmesan cheese, shaved","1 cup croutons","2 anchovy fillets","1 clove garlic","2 tbsp lemon juice","1 tsp Dijon mustard","1/3 cup olive oil","1 egg yolk"]
body.instructions:
1. Wash and chop romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
2. For the dressing: mash anchovies and garlic into a paste.
3. Whisk in egg yolk, lemon juice, and Dijon mustard.
4. Slowly drizzle in olive oil while whisking to emulsify.
5. Toss lettuce with dressing until evenly coated.
6. Top with croutons and shaved parmesan. Serve immediately.

body.title: Grilled Chicken Wrap
body.description: A hearty lunch wrap loaded with grilled chicken, fresh vegetables, and tangy yogurt sauce.
body.ingredients: ["2 chicken breasts","4 large flour tortillas","1 cup mixed greens","1 tomato, diced","1/2 cucumber, sliced","1/4 red onion, sliced","1/2 cup Greek yogurt","1 tbsp lemon juice","1 tsp garlic powder","Salt and pepper"]
body.instructions:
1. Season chicken with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
2. Grill chicken over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
3. Let chicken rest 5 minutes, then slice.
4. Mix yogurt with lemon juice and a pinch of salt.
5. Warm tortillas on the grill for 30 seconds.
6. Layer yogurt sauce, greens, chicken, tomato, cucumber, and onion.
7. Roll up tightly, tucking in the sides.

body.title: Chocolate Lava Cake
body.description: Decadent individual chocolate cakes with a molten center. An impressive dessert that is easier than it looks.
body.ingredients: ["200g dark chocolate","100g butter","2 eggs","2 egg yolks","1/4 cup sugar","2 tbsp flour","Butter and cocoa for ramekins","Vanilla ice cream for serving"]
body.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Butter and dust 4 ramekins with cocoa powder.
2. Melt chocolate and butter together in a double boiler.
3. Whisk eggs, egg yolks, and sugar until thick and pale.
4. Fold chocolate mixture into egg mixture.
5. Gently fold in flour until just combined.
6. Divide batter among ramekins.
7. Bake for 12-14 minutes until edges are set but center is soft.
8. Let cool 1 minute, then invert onto plates. Serve with vanilla ice cream.

body.title: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
body.description: Trendy and nutritious breakfast featuring creamy avocado on crispy sourdough topped with a perfectly poached egg.
body.ingredients: ["2 slices sourdough bread","1 ripe avocado","2 eggs","1 tbsp white vinegar","Red pepper flakes","Salt and pepper","Lemon juice"]
body.instructions:
1. Toast the sourdough slices until golden and crispy.
2. Mash the avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
3. Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer, add vinegar.
4. Create a swirl in the water and carefully drop in an egg. Poach for 3-4 minutes.
5. Spread mashed avocado on toast, top with poached egg.
6. Season with red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper.

body.title: Caesar Salad
body.description: Crisp romaine lettuce with homemade Caesar dressing, crunchy croutons, and shaved parmesan.
body.ingredients: ["1 head romaine lettuce","1/2 cup parmesan cheese, shaved","1 cup croutons","2 anchovy fillets","1 clove garlic","2 tbsp lemon juice","1 tsp Dijon mustard","1/3 cup olive oil","1 egg yolk"]
body.instructions:
1. Wash and chop romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
2. For the dressing: mash anchovies and garlic into a paste.
3. Whisk in egg yolk, lemon juice, and Dijon mustard.
4. Slowly drizzle in olive oil while whisking to emulsify.
5. Toss lettuce with dressing until evenly coated.
6. Top with croutons and shaved parmesan. Serve immediately.

body.title: Grilled Chicken Wrap
body.description: A hearty lunch wrap loaded with grilled chicken, fresh vegetables, and tangy yogurt sauce.
body.ingredients: ["2 chicken breasts","4 large flour tortillas","1 cup mixed greens","1 tomato, diced","1/2 cucumber, sliced","1/4 red onion, sliced","1/2 cup Greek yogurt","1 tbsp lemon juice","1 tsp garlic powder","Salt and pepper"]
body.instructions:
1. Season chicken with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
2. Grill chicken over medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
3. Let chicken rest 5 minutes, then slice.
4. Mix yogurt with lemon juice and a pinch of salt.
5. Warm tortillas on the grill for 30 seconds.
6. Layer yogurt sauce, greens, chicken, tomato, cucumber, and onion.
7. Roll up tightly, tucking in the sides.

body.title: Chocolate Lava Cake
body.description: Decadent individual chocolate cakes with a molten center. An impressive dessert that is easier than it looks.
body.ingredients: ["200g dark chocolate","100g butter","2 eggs","2 egg yolks","1/4 cup sugar","2 tbsp flour","Butter and cocoa for ramekins","Vanilla ice cream for serving"]
body.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Butter and dust 4 ramekins with cocoa powder.
2. Melt chocolate and butter together in a double boiler.
3. Whisk eggs, egg yolks, and sugar until thick and pale.
4. Fold chocolate mixture into egg mixture.
5. Gently fold in flour until just combined.
6. Divide batter among ramekins.
7. Bake for 12-14 minutes until edges are set but center is soft.
8. Let cool 1 minute, then invert onto plates. Serve with vanilla ice cream.

body.title: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
body.description: Trendy and nutritious breakfast featuring creamy avocado on crispy sourdough topped with a perfectly poached egg.
body.ingredients: ["2 slices sourdough bread","1 ripe avocado","2 eggs","1 tbsp white vinegar","Red pepper flakes","Salt and pepper","Lemon juice"]
body.instructions:
1. Toast the sourdough slices until golden and crispy.
2. Mash the avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
3. Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer, add vinegar.
4. Create a swirl in the water and carefully drop in an egg. Poach for 3-4 minutes.
5. Spread mashed avocado on toast, top with poached egg.
6. Season with red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper.

body.title: Tiramisu
body.description: Classic Italian no-bake dessert with layers of coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.
body.ingredients: ["6 egg yolks","3/4 cup sugar","500g mascarpone cheese","2 cups heavy cream","2 cups strong espresso, cooled","3 tbsp coffee liqueur","24 ladyfinger biscuits","Cocoa powder","Dark chocolate shavings"]
body.instructions:
1. Whisk egg yolks and sugar until thick and pale.
2. Add mascarpone and mix until smooth.
3. Whip heavy cream to stiff peaks, fold into mascarpone mixture.
4. Combine cooled espresso with coffee liqueur.
5. Quickly dip each ladyfinger in the coffee mixture.
6. Layer dipped ladyfingers in a 9x13 dish.
7. Spread half the mascarpone cream over the ladyfingers.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Dust generously with cocoa powder and top with chocolate shavings.
10. Refrigerate at least 4 hours, preferably overnight.

body.title: Teriyaki Salmon
body.description: Glazed salmon fillets with a sweet and savory homemade teriyaki sauce, served with steamed rice.
body.ingredients: ["4 salmon fillets","1/4 cup soy sauce","2 tbsp mirin","2 tbsp sake","1 tbsp sugar","1 tsp ginger, grated","2 cups jasmine rice","Sesame seeds","Green onions"]
body.instructions:
1. Mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, and ginger for the teriyaki sauce.
2. Marinate salmon in half the sauce for 15 minutes.
3. Cook rice according to package directions.
4. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear salmon skin-side up for 3 minutes.
5. Flip and cook for 3 more minutes.
6. Pour remaining sauce over salmon and let it glaze for 1 minute.
7. Serve over rice, garnished with sesame seeds and sliced green onions.

body.title: Tiramisu
body.description: Classic Italian no-bake dessert with layers of coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.
body.ingredients: ["6 egg yolks","3/4 cup sugar","500g mascarpone cheese","2 cups heavy cream","2 cups strong espresso, cooled","3 tbsp coffee liqueur","24 ladyfinger biscuits","Cocoa powder","Dark chocolate shavings"]
body.instructions:
1. Whisk egg yolks and sugar until thick and pale.

body.title: Tiramisu
body.description: Classic Italian no-bake dessert with layers of coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.
body.ingredients: ["6 egg yolks","3/4 cup sugar","500g mascarpone cheese","2 cups heavy cream","2 cups strong espresso, cooled","3 tbsp coffee liqueur","24 ladyfinger biscuits","Cocoa powder","Dark chocolate shavings"]
body.instructions:
1. Whisk egg yolks and sugar until thick and pale.
2. Add mascarpone and mix until smooth.
3. Whip heavy cream to stiff peaks, fold into mascarpone mixture.
4. Combine cooled espresso with coffee liqueur.
5. Quickly dip each ladyfinger in the coffee mixture.
6. Layer dipped ladyfingers in a 9x13 dish.
7. Spread half the mascarpone cream over the ladyfingers.
8. Repeat layers.
9. Dust generously with cocoa powder and top with chocolate shavings.
10. Refrigerate at least 4 hours, preferably overnight.
